#  Email Specifications (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:** 'Standard' level permissions or higher on the project's Specifications tool.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Specifications** tool on your Android device.
  2. Search for or tap the division of the specification section you want to email. See [Search for Specifications (Android).](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-android/tutorials/search-for-specifications-android)
  3. Search for or tap the specification section you wish to email. See [Search for Specifications (Android).](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-android/tutorials/search-for-specifications-android)
  4. Tap **Share** ![Icon Share With Bkgd Android](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/0e3aa2e80fedbba66f4fa25b048c1805/8456c52229f62aefbb252639fb45221b/icon-share-with-bkgd-android.png?fm=webp&h=18).  
![Specifications Android Email Specifications](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/e08c4b8f92a265c4da87414f251806be/202eb3839d5a74b1732f9182fbb8ac33/specifications-android-email-specifications.png?fm=webp)
  5. Tap your preferred email application.
  6. Review the information and make edits as necessary.
     * **Document Name:** Tap to edit the name of the document that will appear in the email.
     * **Pages:** Tap to send the current page, a certain range of pages (e.g. pg.1-14), or all of the pages in the specification section.
     * **Annotations:** Tap to select one of the following options:
       * **Embed Annotations:** Annotations will remain editable and are embedded into the PDF.
       * **Flatten Annotations:** Annotations are rendered in the PDF and are read only.
       * **Ignore Annotations:** The PDF will not contain any annotations.
  7. Tap **Share**.
  8. Tap to fill out the appropriate fields in email form.
  9. Tap **Send** to email the specification.


## See Also
  * [View Specifications (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-android/tutorials/view-specifications-android)
  * [Download Specifications (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-android/tutorials/download-specifications-android)
  * [Search for Specifications (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-android/tutorials/search-for-specifications-android)
title: Email Specifications (Android)
description: How to email specifications to users from your Android mobile device.
